title: Geepas 750W Doughnut Maker Machine, 8 Hole - Stainless Steel Donut Maker, Non-Stick Doughnut Snack Maker Machine - Makes Crispy Golden Fresh 8 Pcs Of Doughnuts In One Go – 2 Years Warranty
features: MAKES 8 DELICIOUS DOUGHNUTS AT ONCE: Make 8 mini doughnuts at a time with this amazing doughnut maker and create the tastiest treats in a matter of minutes! Creates healthier doughnuts than usual due to baking them and not frying them!
EXTRA DEEP NON-STICK COATING PLATES: Cook tasty donuts easily with just a touch of oil thanks to the non-stick cooking plates. Whilst making cleaning up easy, simply wipe down with a damp cloth.

POWER & READY LIGHT INDICATOR, THERMOSTATICALLY CONTROL: The convenient light indicator shows when the donut machine has reached the ideal temperature for starting to cook your very own batch of sweet or savoury, restaurant-quality, donuts the easy way.

FEATURES: The Doughnut maker benefits from a cool touch handle allowing you to check on your donuts whilst protecting you from the heat of the appliance, cord storage, indicator ready light and non-slip feet. Perfect for children to join in with the cooking or to create the perfect treats at a party!
description: Product Description 8 PIECE CAPACITY Make 8 mini doughnuts at a time with this amazing doughnut maker and create the tastiest treats in a matter of minutes! EASY CLEANING Keep your appliance spotless with ease – simply wipe down with a damp cloth for quick and effortless cleaning. INDICATOR LIGHT The convenient light indicator lets you know when the donut maker is perfectly heated and ready to bake delicious treats. COMPACT & SPACE SAVING DESIGN Compact design ensures effortless storage, keeping your kitchen neat when the doughnut maker is not in use. NON-STICK PLATES Enjoy delicious homemade donuts with ease – the non-stick plates require just a touch of oil for perfect results every time. COOL TOUCH HANDLE Enjoy effortless baking with the cool touch handle that lets you check donuts safely without heat exposure. SKID RESTISTANT FEET Enjoy hassle-free baking with this Non Stick Electric Doughnut Maker featuring non slip feet and multi heat vents for safety. AUTOMATIC TEMPERATURE CONTROL The donut maker signals when it’s ready, so you can start cooking perfectly golden, delicious doughnuts with ease.
